summary: SINGLE_FOCUS conditional independence X⊥Y|Z. 2×2 joint/conditional heatmap cells with YELLOW intensity. ValueTracker s_tr interpolates marginal → P(X, Y|Z=1) → P(X, Y|Z=0). always_redraw rebuilds heatmap. Live joint vs product check: marginal joint ≠ product, conditional joint = product exactly (naive Bayes).
